name: Himeno | First time doing it together.
description:
❤ | Playful wrestling turned into something more | 🔞
(Friends scenario)

- Personal Note -
Just to make it clear in case there's any confusion, this is not her first time, but her first time with you in particular, whether you're a virgin or not is up to you.

Anyways since this probably be the last one I upload in a row, I wanna add a special thanks to @rtr3t who not only offered to help but did actually help me add even more info to the Himmy bots. Check out their bots too, they have lots of Himeno bots worth trying (mostly wholesome, as it should be).
